# CWE-214 negative: token supplied via stdin not argv (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-214-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"
	"strings"
)

// CWE-214 Invocation of Process Using Visible Sensitive Information (mitigated)
func RunSnapshotJob(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	token := r.Header.Get("X-Api-Token")
	cmd := exec.Command("archivectl", "--target", "ledger")
	cmd.Stdin = strings.NewReader(token)
	if err := cmd.Run(); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "backup", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "started"})
}
